name: laravel-ide-helper-runner
description: Automatically runs Laravel IDE helper commands on save.

laravelIdeHelperRunner.runOnSave.description: Enable or disable the extension from running on save.

laravelIdeHelperRunner.parallelExecution.description: Run the generators in parallel instead of sequentially.

laravelIdeHelperRunner.phpPath.description: The command prefix to run PHP. Use 'ddev exec php', './vendor/bin/sail php', or just 'php'.

laravelIdeHelperRunner.debounceDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before running the command after saving a file.

laravelIdeHelperRunner.autoClearConsole.description: Clear the output console before running the commands.

laravelIdeHelperRunner.composerCommand.description: The command prefix to run Composer. Use 'ddev composer', './vendor/bin/sail composer', or just 'composer'.

laravelIdeHelperRunner.addToGitignore.description: Automatically add the generated _ide_helper files to .gitignore when auto-installing the package.

laravelIdeHelperRunner.showNotifications.description: Show a notification popup when the command starts and finishes successfully.
